query: Guyana AI data center Cerebras 100MW status May 2026

results.title: Cerebras signs on for 40MW of capacity at Digi Power X data center in Alabama - DCD
results.description: The data center itself is still under development, with Digi Power X set to deliver the data center in two phases: phase one with 15MW of IT load, and phase two to deliver 25MW incrementally for a total IT capacity of 40MW.

results.title: Cerebras
results.description: Cerebras is the go-to platform for fast and effortless AI training. Learn more at cerebras.ai.
